entries.source: A free AI learning companion for people teaching themselves.
entries.value: 'n gratis AI-leermaat vir mense wat zichzelf onderwysen.

entries.source: A free AI tutor for students who want to understand, not copy.
entries.value: 'n gratis AI-tutor vir studente wat wil begrijpen, nie kopieer.

entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: 'n goede AI-werkvloei vir gesinne moet die leerder zelfstandiger maak, nie afhangender. Ouders kan openbare bladsye gebruik om te sien waarvoor elke modus bedoel is voordat 'n kind begint.

entries.source: A parent-friendly guide to inspir's public AI learning modes for homework hints, explanation, study routines, flashcards, and safer learning conversations.
entries.value: 'n oudervriendelijke gids vir die openbare AI-leermodusse van inspir vir huiswerkwenke, verduideliking, studieroetines, flitskaarte en veiliger leergesprekken.

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: Studente, ouers, onderwysers en autodidactische leerders zoeken dikwels met ander woorde na dieselfde AI-tutor. Afsonderlijke bladsye maak die regte usegevalle en veiligheidsgrense duideliker.

entries.source: Are audience pages public and indexable?
entries.value: Is teikengroepbladsye openbaar en indekseerbaar?

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: Vra om 'n wenk, laat die leerder die volgende stap verduidelik en gebruik daarna 'n vasvra of flitskaart om te kontroleer of die idee is bly hangen.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: Vra om wenke, kontroles en terugvoer voordat jy om 'n uitgewerkt antwoord vra.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: Vra om voorkennis, 'n eenvoudig model, voorbeelde en 'n veelvoorkomde wanopvatting.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: Vra om terugvoer op struktuur, bewyse en helderheid terwyl die finale konsep van jou bly.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: Vra om die benodigde voorkennis, 'n model in eenvoudige taal, 'n voorbeeld, 'n oefentaak en 'n manier om begrip te testen.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: Vra die leerder om te verduidelik wat er oor elke wenk veranderde.

entries.value: Verwar 'n vinnig antwoord nie met beheersing.

entries.value: Verduidelik elke geaccepteerde stap in jy eie woorde terug uit.

entries.source: Explore public AI learning modes teachers can use to evaluate Socratic tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and classroom-ready study workflows.
entries.value: Verken openbare AI-leermodusse waarmee onderwysers Sokratiese begeleiding, vasvrae, flitskaarte, skryferugvoer, bronkritiek en klaskamerklare studiewerkvloeie kan beoordeel.

entries.value: Sluit af met terug-verduidelik, 'n vasvra, 'n flitskaart, 'n projekstap of 'n studieroetine.

entries.source: inspir is for students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners who need focused AI learning modes for explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir is er vir studente, ouers, onderwysers en selfleerders wat gefokusde AI-leermodusse nodig wat vir verduideliking, vrae, wenke, vasvrae, flitskaarte, terugvoer en studiebebeplanning.

entries.source: inspir is organized into focused modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir is georgaanniseerd in gefokusde modusse soos Sokratiese begeleiding, huiswerkwenke, vasvrae, flitskaarte, skryferugvoer, bronkritiek en studiebebeplanning.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: Die openbare modusse van inspir laat onderwysers wat produk beoordeel via regte leervloei voordat hulle 'n skoolimplementatie of 'n op maat gemaakt klaskamerpad overwegen.

entries.source: Job
entries.value: Taak

entries.source: Keep private saved conversations out of public discovery and citation surfaces.
entries.value: Hou privé gestoor gesprekken buite openbare vindbaarheid en citatieoppervlakken.

entries.source: Keep the session focused on learning evidence, not passive answer collection.
entries.value: Hou die sessie gefokus op leerbewyse, nie op passiewe antwoordversameling.

entries.source: learn anything with AI
entries.value: leer alles met AI

entries.source: Learn by building
entries.value: Leer deur te bouwen

entries.source: Learning path
entries.value: Leerpad

entries.source: Learning workflow
entries.value: Leerwerkvloei

entries.source: Make confusion easier to talk about
entries.value: Maak verwarring makkelijker bespreekbaar

entries.source: Make every learning session end with a test, artifact, or review step.
entries.value: Laat elke leersessie eindigen met 'n toets, artefact of herhalingsstap.

entries.source: Make the habit survivable
entries.value: Maak die gewoonte vol te hou

entries.source: Mode
entries.value: Modus

entries.source: Move from public testing to school deployment
entries.value: Ga van openbaar testen na skoolimplementatie

entries.source: Move school-specific privacy, access, and deployment questions to the schools pathway.
entries.value: Verplek skoolspesifieke vrae oor privaatheid, toegang en implementatie na wat skooltraject.

entries.source: Name the learning situation.
entries.value: Benoem die leersituatie.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: Nee. Openbare bladsye is indekseerbaar, maar privé gestoor chats is nie opgenomen in die sitemap, llms-leers of AI-inhoudindex.

entries.source: Open a focused public mode.
entries.value: Maak oop 'n gefokusde openbare modus.

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: Maak 'n openbare modus, test wat leerdergedrag oop en kontroleer of wat gepas vra, wenke geeft, vasvrat of kritiek geeft.

entries.source: Open audience path
entries.value: Maak teikengroeptraject oop

entries.source: Open mode
entries.value: Maak modus oop

entries.source: Open path
entries.value: Maak pad oop

entries.source: Open the learning map
entries.value: Open die leerkaart

entries.source: Open this route
entries.value: Maak hierdie roete oop

entries.source: Open workflow
entries.value: Workflow oopmaak

entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Ouders probeer dikwels te help sonder wat oor te neem. inspir geeft gesinne openbare modusse wat leergedrag sigbaar maak: wenke, vrae, verduidelik in eie woorde, herhaling en studiebebeplanning.

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Plak die vraag, wat jy probeer het en waar jy vastloopt. Vra om die kleinste nuttige wenk, nie om wat eindantwoord.

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Oefen

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Openbare bladsye tonen produkgedrag, geen privaatwerk van studente.

entries.source: Read guide
entries.value: Lees gids

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
entries.value: Gereed om die eerste modus te probeer?

entries.source: Research without losing the thread
entries.value: Onderzoek sonder die draad kwijt te raken

entries.source: Review
entries.value: Herhaling

entries.source: safe AI learning tool for students
entries.value: veilige AI-leerhulpmiddel vir studente

entries.source: Search intent
entries.value: Soekintentie

entries.source: self-taught learner
entries.value: zelfleerde

entries.source: Self-taught learners need momentum and structure. inspir helps turn curiosity into a path: explain, build, test, review, and keep going.
entries.value: Zelfleerders wat momentum en struktuur nodig. inspir help nuusgierigheid om te stapten in 'n pad: verduidelik, bouwen, testen, herhalen en doorgaan.

entries.source: Start a topic from first principles
entries.value: Begin 'n onderwerp vanuit eerste principes

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Begin leer

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: Begin met 'n eenvoudige verduideliking en stel daarna Sokratiese vrae totdat jy wat self kan verduidelik.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: Begin met Learn Anything vir 'n eenvoudige verduideliking, Homework Coach vir 'n taak waar jy vastloopt, of Flashcard Builder wanneer herhalen die doel is.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: Begin met openbare begeleiding en oopmaak daarna die regte modus.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: Begin met die modus wat past by wat moment.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: Begin met die openbare modusse en gebruik daarna die skolebladsy om implementatiestappe, use-gevalle en vertrouesgrenzen te besluitkijken.

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: Studentehuiswerk, ouderondersteuning, onderwyserevaluering en zelfstudie wat allemaal 'n ander kader nodig.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Studente wat vinnigle hulp nodig, maar wat hulp moet wat dink nog steeds in hulle handen laat. inspir stuurt veelvoorkomde studiemomenten na gefokusde openbare modusse in plaas van na een generieke antwoordbox.

entries.source: Students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners search for different things. These pages route each audience to the right public mode, guide, and study workflow.
entries.value: Studente, ouers, onderwysers en zelfleerders zoeken na verskillende dingen. Hierdie bladsye lei elke openbaar na die regte openbare modus, gids en studiewerkvloei.

entries.source: Support writing while preserving voice
entries.value: Ondersteun skryf terwyl die eie stem behou bly

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: Docenten wat meer nodig dan 'n generieke chatbot. Hulle wat voorspelbaar leergedrag nodig: vrae vra, redenasieen kontroleer, oefening genereer, die stem van die student bewaar en wanopvattings sigbaar maak.

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: Die openbaarsbladsye maak die verwagte leergedrag expliciet, zodat die eerste sessie met beter oordeel begint.

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Die openbaarszoekvrae waarop hierdie hub is gebou.

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: Die bladsye vra geen privaatgesprekken bloot. Hulle orgaanniseren openbare modusse, prompts, gidse, werkvloeie en veiligheidsgrense, zodat 'n leerder op die regte plek kan begin.

entries.source: The same AI tutor can be a homework hint, a parent-supervised explain-back loop, a teacher evaluation surface, or a self-study coach. The page should make that clear.
entries.value: Dezelfde AI-tutor kan 'n huiswerkwenk is, 'n deur ouers begeleide terug-verduideliking-lus, 'n evalueringomgeving vir onderwysers of 'n zelfstudieafrigter. Die bladsy moet dat duidelik maak.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: Die zoekvrae waarvoor hierdie bladsy is ontwerp.

entries.source: The self-study challenge is not just finding information. It is choosing the next right action and knowing whether the idea actually stuck.
entries.value: Die uitdaging van zelfstudie is nie net inligting vind. Die is die regte volgende aksie kiezen en weten of die idee regtig is bly hangen.

entries.source: The strongest SEO pages do not strand a learner. They connect the audience intent to paths, workflows, guides, and repeatable review.
entries.value: Die sterkste SEO-bladsye laat 'n leerder nie stranden. Hulle verbinden die openbaarsintentie met paden, werkvloeie, gidse en herhaalbare herhaling.

entries.source: The strongest student workflow is not answer-copying. It is a loop: explain the stuck point, ask one better question, get a hint, try again, then review the miss.
entries.value: Die sterkste studentewerkvloei is geen antwoorde kopieer. Die is 'n lus: verduidelik uit waar jy vastloopt, stel een beter vraag, krijg 'n wenk, probeer weer en herhaal daarna die misser.

entries.source: These are live guest entrypoints. They are public and indexable, while private user conversations stay outside sitemap and AI discovery files.
entries.value: Hierdie is lewendig gaanstinstappunte. Hulle is openbaar en indekseerbaar, terwyl privaatgesprekken van gebruikers buite sitemap- en AI-discoveryleers bly.

entries.source: These phrases are visible to learners and included in structured discovery so AI answer engines can understand the audience-specific purpose of the page.
entries.value: Hierdie zinnen is sigbaar vir leerders en opgenomen in gestruktureerdee discovery, zodat AI-antwoordmasjiene die openbaresspesifieke doel van die bladsy kan begrijpen.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a quiz or flashcard before moving on.
entries.value: Verander verwarring om in 'n vasvra of flitskaart voordat jy verdergaanat.

entries.source: Turn mistakes into review
entries.value: Verander foute om in herhaling

entries.source: Turn the first click into a complete learning loop.
entries.value: Maak van die eerste klik 'n volledige leerlus.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Tussentydse bystand

entries.source: Understand a topic before the test
entries.value: 'n onderwerp begrijpen vir die toets

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Gebruik 'n modus wat is afgestem op wenke, vrae, vasvrae, flitskaarte, skryferugvoer of beplanning.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Gebruik AI vir wenke, verduideliking, foutkontroles en herhaallusse. Vra nie om 'n eindantwoord dat jy nie kan verduidelik.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: Gebruik Code Tutor of Project Coach om 'n vaag doel om te stapten in 'n klein toetsbare volgende stap.

entries.source: Use hint-first and explain-back workflows for homework support.
entries.value: Gebruik wenk-first en verduidelik-wat-uit-werkvloeie vir huiswerkondersteuning.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach to ask for a hint, then ask the learner to explain the next move.
entries.value: Gebruik Homework Coach om om 'n wenk te vrae en laat die leerder daarna die volgende stap verduidelik.

entries.source: Use inspir as a free AI tutor for students: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep.
entries.value: Gebruik inspir as gratis AI-tutor vir studente: huiswerkwenke, Sokratiese vrae, wiskundige stapkontroles, skryferugvoer, vasvrae, flitskaarte en eksamenvoorbereiding.

entries.source: Use inspir to learn anything independently with explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, study plans, and habit support.
entries.value: Gebruik inspir om zelfstandig alles te leer met verduideliking, kodebegeleiding, projekafrigtering, navorsingshulp, conceptmaps, studieplannen en gewoonteondersteuning.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything to get a simpler model, prerequisite ideas, and examples at the right level.
entries.value: Gebruik Learn Anything om 'n eenvoudiger model, voorkennis en voorbeelde op die regte vlak te kry.

entries.source: Use public mode descriptions to choose the behavior before a session starts.
entries.value: Gebruik openbare modusbeschrijvingen om wat gedrag te kiezen voordat 'n sessie begint.

entries.source: Use quiz and flashcard modes for active recall, then route missed items into review.
entries.value: Gebruik vasvra- en flitskaartmodi vir aktiewe herroeping en stuur gemiste items daarna na herhaling.

entries.source: Use quizzes and flashcards to make missed questions visible and repeatable.
entries.value: Gebruik vasvrae en flitskaarte om gemiste vrae sigbaar en herhaalbaar te maak.

entries.source: Use quizzes, flashcards, and Socratic questions so the learner shows what they understand.
entries.value: Gebruik vasvrae, flitskaarte en Sokratiese vrae zodat die leerder laat sien wat hy of hulle begrijpt.

entries.source: Use Research Assistant, Source Critic, and Concept Map Builder to organize claims and evidence.
entries.value: Gebruik Research Assistant, Source Critic en Concept Map Builder om claims en bewyse te ordenen.

entries.source: Use source critique for claims you might cite or act on.
entries.value: Gebruik bronkritiek vir claims wat jy moontlik citeert of waarop jy handelt.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder and Habit Coach to build a routine that can restart after missed days.
entries.value: Gebruik Study Plan Builder en Habit Coach om 'n roetine te bouwen wat na gemiste dagen weer kan starten.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder or Habit Coach to make small sessions and restarts visible.
entries.value: Gebruik Study Plan Builder of Habit Coach om klein sessies en herstarts sigbaar te maak.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder to choose a small goal, then use quizzes, flashcards, project steps, or concept maps to prove progress.
entries.value: Gebruik Study Plan Builder om 'n klein doel te kiezen en gebruik daarna vasvrae, flitskaarte, projekstappe of conceptmaps om voortgaanng te besluitwysen.

entries.source: Use the school page to explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, and rollout steps.
entries.value: Gebruik die skoolbladsy om aangepaste werkvloeie, vertroulikheidsbehoeften en uitrolstappe te verkennen.

entries.source: Use Writing Coach for feedback on structure, clarity, evidence, and revision priorities.
entries.value: Gebruik Writing Coach vir terugvoer op struktuur, helderheid, bewyse en hersieningsprioriteiten.

entries.source: Useful AI learning has a clear contract.
entries.value: Nuttige AI-leerhulp wat 'n duidelik contract.

entries.source: Want the broadest place to start?
entries.value: Wil jy die breedste plek om te begin?

entries.source: What is the best parent-supervised workflow?
entries.value: Wat is die beste werkvloei onder ouderlijk toesig?

entries.source: What should a self-taught learner ask first?
entries.value: Wat moet 'n autodidactische leerder eers vrae?

entries.source: What should a student try first?
entries.value: Wat moet 'n student eers probeer?

entries.source: Where should a school team go next?
entries.value: Waar moet 'n skoolteam daarna natoe?

entries.source: Who is inspir for?
entries.value: Vir wie is inspir bedoel?

entries.source: Why separate pages for different audiences?
entries.value: Waarom aparte bladsye vir verskillende teikengroepe?

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Ja. Doelgroepbladsye skakel net na openbare gasmodusse, gidse, promptstarters, leerpaden en AI-leesbare discoveryleers. Prive gestoor chats bly uitgesloten.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Ja. Publieke gasmodusse laat onderwysers leergedrag testen voordat hulle 'n aangepaste implementatie bepraat.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Ja. Publieke gasmodusse soos Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, vasvrae, flitskaarte en skryferugvoer oopmaak direk.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Ja. Publieke modusse werk vir skoolonderwerpe, professionele vaardighede, kodeer, navorsing, projeken en persoonlike studieroetines.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Ja. Die openbare gasmodusse en teikengroepbladsye is zo ontwerp dat ouers wat leergedrag kan inspecteren voordat hulle erop vertroue.
